caption: A large assembly of people, predominantly men, is seated in rows of wooden tiered seating in what appears to be a legislative chamber or parliament. Most attendees are wearing traditional Indian attire, including white kurtas and Nehru jackets, though some wear Western-style shirts and suits. The crowd is densely packed, with individuals seated closely together. Throughout the sequence, the scene remains largely static, with people sitting and looking forward. Small movements are visible as some individuals shift in their seats, turn their heads to talk to neighbors, or adjust their posture. There are no visible logos, on-screen text, or specialized equipment other than the wooden desks and benches. The lighting is consistent across the frames, highlighting the neutral tones of the clothing and the warm brown of the wooden interior.
